caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT!" written in white across the chest, a black baseball cap with a gold emblem, and large over-ear headphones is seated in a podcast studio. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm and is laughing with his eyes closed. In the background, white walls feature gold stars and text that reads "GRIND HUSTLE." On-screen graphics include a logo for "P STALK PODCAST" on the left and a red and white logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101" on the right. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to laugh, shifting his head slightly while maintaining his expression of amusement. He wears a gold chain around his neck, and a small circular logo is visible on the bottom right of his shirt.
